name: ankit-portfolio
description: Prebuilt static portfolio prepared for Vercel deployment.

scripts.build: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); console.log('Using Node.js ' + process.version); if (!fs.existsSync('public/index.html')) throw new Error('Missing public/index.html'); console.log('Static site ready for Vercel.');"
scripts.test: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('vercel.json','utf8')); const html = fs.readFileSync('public/index.html','utf8'); for (const asset of ['/static/js/main.bde1b0d5.js','/static/css/main.29bc8131.css']) { if (!html.includes(asset)) throw new Error('Missing asset reference: ' + asset); if (!fs.existsSync('public' + asset)) throw new Error('Missing asset file: public' + asset); } console.log('Static deployment checks passed.');"
